title: Karma Veeran Lyrics Kochadaiiyaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Karam Veeran
Singers: A. R. Rahman, A. R. Raihanah
Lyrics: Vairamuthu
Music: AR Rahman
Movie: Kochadaiiyaan

Aagaaya megangal pozhiyumbothu
aadhayam keladhu.
Thaainadu kaakindra ullam 
endrum thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.
thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.

Ye veeraney,  Karma veeraney,
kadamai veeraney, Karma veeraney.

Tholvigalaale thuvandu vidaadhey
vettrigalaale veri kollaadhey.

Kalladi padumenbadhaale -maram
kaaikkaamal povadhillai.
maalaigalai kandu mayangaadhey
malaigalai kandu kalangaadhey.
Solladi padumenbadhaale
vettri kaanaamal povadhillai.

Kaattre kaattre nee thoonguvadhe illai
karma veeraney veeraney nee oivadhey illai
Vazhve vazhve nee theeruvadhe illai - indha
vazhvile sathiyam thorpadhe illai.

Nindra idaththil nirkka vendumaa
nee odikkonde iru.
nimmadhi vazhvil vandumaa
nee paadikkonde iru. 

Aagaaya megangal pozhiyumbothu
aadhayam keladhu.
Thaainadu kaakindra ullam 
endrum thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.
thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.
thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.

Kaattre kaattre nee thoonguvadhe illai
karma veeraney veeraney nee oivadhe illai
vazhve vazhve nee theeruvadhe illai - indha 
vazhvile sathiyam thorpadhe illai.

Khozhaigal mannithaal - adhu
peridhalla.. peridhalla..
veerargal  manniththaal- adhu
varalaaru ..varalaaru.

Kaattre kaattre nee thoonguvadhe illai
karma veeraney veeraney nee oivadhe illai
vazhve vazhve nee theeruvadhe illai - indha 
vazhvile sathiyam thorpadhe illai. (2)

Ponnum mannum vendru
mudippavan kadamai veerane - andha
ponnai orunaal mannaai
paarpavan karma veeraney.
karma veeraney.

Aagaaya megangal pozhiyumbothu
aadhayam keladhu.
Thaainadu kaakindra ullam endrum
thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.
thanakkaga vaazhaadhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Karma Veeran?

The song emphasizes duty, valor, and the spirit of perseverance.

Who composed the music for Kochadaiiyaan?

The music for Kochadaiiyaan was composed by AR Rahman.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during moments highlighting the protagonist's commitment to his duties and his unwavering spirit.

Who are the singers of Karma Veeran?

The song is sung by AR Rahman and AR Raihanah.

When was Kochadaiiyaan released?

The movie Kochadaiiyaan was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Karma Veeran is a motivational theme song from the movie Kochadaiiyaan, capturing the essence of duty and valor. The lyrics by Vairamuthu inspire resilience and determination, while the powerful composition by AR Rahman elevates the song's impact. Sung by AR Rahman and AR Raihanah, it evokes a sense of energy and motivation, perfectly aligning with the film's narrative of heroism and dedication. The song serves as a rallying cry for perseverance and strength in the face of challenges.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Karma Veeran from Kochadaiiyaan is a powerful anthem that combines the legendary musical genius of AR Rahman with the evocative lyrics of Vairamuthu. Sung by AR Rahman and AR Raihanah, this track is a tribute to the spirit of duty and valor. Experience the electrifying energy and motivational vibe that makes this song a standout piece in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: When the sky clouds rain, there is no profit. The heart that protects the motherland never lives for itself. Never lives for itself.
Oh warrior, brave warrior, duty-bound warrior, brave warrior.

Don't give up because of failures, don't get excited by victories. Just because a stone hits, a tree doesn't stop bearing fruit. Don't get dazzled by garlands, don't get shaken by mountains. Just because words hurt, success doesn't stop coming. Wind, wind, you never sleep, brave warrior, you never rest. Life, life, you never end, in this life, truth never fails. Should you stand still where you are? Keep running. Will peace come in life? Keep singing. When the sky clouds rain, there is no profit. The heart that protects the motherland never lives for itself. Never lives for itself. Never lives for itself.
Wind, wind, you never sleep, brave warrior, you never rest. Life, life, you never end, in this life, truth never fails. If cowards forgive, it's not great. If warriors forgive, it's history.
Wind, wind, you never sleep, brave warrior, you never rest. Life, life, you never end, in this life, truth never fails.
The one who conquers gold and land is a duty-bound warrior. The one who sees that gold turn to dust one day is a brave warrior. Brave warrior.
When the sky clouds rain, there is no profit. The heart that protects the motherland never lives for itself. Never lives for itself.
